_comment: Ethereum HOODI testnet (chainId 560048). Address registry for the FYUSD x Concrete integration testnet smoke. FYUSD is the only entry pre-populated — Concrete deployed it on HOODI directly because they don't support Sepolia for the partner stable-vault flow. The remaining addresses fill in as `scripts/multisig/deploy-safe.js` and `scripts/deploy-phase1.js` run against this network. See `scripts/deploy-hoodi.js` for the full deploy runbook.
